steps.title: Find circle K area
steps.content:
Circle $K$ has radius $6$, so use the circle area formula to find its area.
$$A_K=\pi(6)^2=36\pi$$

steps.title: Add the two areas
steps.content: Circle $L$ already has area $121\pi$. Add the two circle areas to get the combined area. $$36\pi+121\pi=157\pi$$ The answer is D.
